subject: Re: 795 5th Avenue, NY, NY
body:
this is not a good start,, come see me

----- Original Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Sunday, November 4, 2007 8:56:57 PM
Subject: Fw: 795 5th Avenue, NY, NY



-----Original Message-----
From: "Sarah" <sarah@ellmax.com>

Date: Sun, 4 Nov 2007 20:44:08 
To:<kellens@earthlink.net>
Subject: Fw: 795 5th Avenue, NY, NY


----- Original Message -----
From: PNemcova@AglowProperties.com <PNemcova@AglowProperties.com>
To: Sarah
Sent: Sun Nov 04 16:34:14 2007
Subject: Fw: 795 5th Avenue, NY, NY

Hello Angel,
I will try the number U gived me to call Jeffrey.
Would U show him the attachament please?
He has asked me to look for a place for his friend. Who wanted amazing place in NY for about $50M. This one is little more expensive,but it is possibly the nicest apartment available and we can get it for less than $70M.

Thank U so so much
Have an amazing happy day

Let us light up your life!
Lots of love, light, and happiness,
Petra

Petra Nemcova
Partner

160 Riverside Blvd. #509
New York, NY 10069
646.761.4337
